Snapshot — May 11, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,399.65   z +2.05
  10Y Yield:      4.380%  z +1.02
  WTI Oil:        96.97   z +0.54

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,400 is running well beyond its 63-session range — equities haven't been this stretched in months. 10Y yield at 4.38% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $97 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence sits at 58/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,511 or below 7,289
• 10Y moves beyond 4.58% or below 4.18%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
